configurations.name: card-advisor
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && cd card-advisor && npm run dev

configurations.name: pos-settlement
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && cd pos-settlement && npm run dev -- -p 3002
